backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with order placement/cancellation, bot start/stop controls, configurable spread/interval/numOrders, activity logging, and open/history order tracking via a recurring timer.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the ICDex ICP/ckUSDT Trading Bot SPA, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, responsive multi-row grid of trading panels (control, config, market data, grid preview, open orders, trade history, activity log), and a footer.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: React panel that fetches and displays paginated bot activity log entries with color-coded event types, loading skeletons, error state, and an empty state message.
React panel for starting and stopping the trading bot, displaying live status, config summary, and user-friendly error messages distinguishing network reachability errors from other failures.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Renders a configuration form for bot settings (spread, grid orders, refresh interval) with validation, loading skeletons, and a save button that simulates saving since config is read-only from the backend.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays the current grid levels (buy/sell) fetched from the backend in a scrollable table, with loading skeletons, error states, and a mid-price derived from the lowest sell and highest buy.
Shows live market data (mid price, best bid/ask, order book levels) with dynamic status indicators (LIVE, IDLE, STALE, ERROR) and a relative-time staleness tracker.
Lists open orders sorted by side and price with buy/sell counts, supports cancelling all orders via a mutation, and shows loading skeletons and error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Displays trade history entries sorted reverse-chronologically with price, quantity, status (filled/cancelled/open), and relative timestamps, including loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, using the authenticated Internet Identity if available or falling back to an anonymous actor, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating trading bot state (status, config, orders, logs) by calling the ICP canister actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS for the frontend using Tailwind with a terminal-themed dark color palette (oklch variables) and JetBrains Mono font.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with terminal trading colors (buy/sell/neutral), JetBrains Mono fonts, oklch-based semantic tokens, and custom box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the ICP trading bot setup, known issues (incorrect getOpenOrders call needing replacement with 'pending'), and pending fix request AR-1.
